pi_items.source: Task instructions confirm saving as quantity_distribution and OAD uses .dva extension.
Task instructions explicitly specify this title.
Checked scripts/setup_oracle_analytics.ps1 where it copies the excel file to this exact path.
verifier.py logic checks for file_size > 1000 bytes (approx 1 KB), not 5 KB.

privileged_info_summary: The input dataset is a Superstore variant with 9,000 rows. A critical detail is that the requested "Quantity" column is actually named "Quantity Ordered" in the dataset. To succeed, the agent must use "Quantity Ordered" for the X-axis and change its treatment from Measure to Attribute (so discrete numbers like 1, 2, 3... appear on the axis). The Y-axis should display a count or frequency of these quantities. The final chart should be a bar chart, sorted ascendingly by the discrete quantity sizes (which range from 1 to 170).
